Admin-auth .admin.spec.ts browser suites, ignored admin-host race coverage, admin report/listing moderation browser coverage, authenticated admin signed-URL success, real storage/provider signed URL behavior, real email provider delivery, inbox/bounce/webhook behavior, provider telemetry/observability runtime, and other provider/runtime proof were not run.

coverageGaps.gap: Controlled Chromium admin-boundary and verification-admin journey coverage passed in MRA-E021, but admin-auth .admin.spec.ts browser suites, ignored admin-host race coverage, and admin report/listing moderation browser coverage remain unverified.

Route-handler/direct API Jest checks passed in MRA-E019; MRA-E022 verified the narrower route-handler baseline plus live-server negative/status/header parity for missing Origin/CSRF, OPTIONS, invalid document kind, and unauthenticated valid-kind document access. Authenticated admin signed-URL success, real storage/provider behavior, and any admin-session success path remain unverified.

Local mocked private-feedback telemetry invocation and verification approval/rejection notification email invocation are verified by MRA-E020; real email provider delivery, inbox/bounce/webhook proof, provider observability/telemetry runtime, and other provider/runtime proof remain unverified.
Migration paths were discovered, but SQL line ranges were not audited for every invariant.
Audit logging fail-open behavior is source-observed but not runtime-tested for operational visibility.
